member.name: T:Prime.DtsProcessingService.ConversionUtils
member.summary: Provides helper functions for binary to decimal conversion.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.ConversionUtils.Reverse(System.String)
member.summary: reverse a string.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.ConversionUtils.BinaryToInteger(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Conversion from binary string to a decimal integer.

member.name: T:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DatalogConfigurationSettings
member.summary: DatalogConfigurationSettings Class.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DatalogConfigurationSettings.IsDatalogEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to datalog values or not.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DatalogConfigurationSettings.IsExportToSharedStorageEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to export the data to the shared storage.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DatalogConfigurationSettings.IsCompressedDatalogEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to Compressed Datalog or not.

member.name: T:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsHandler
member.summary: DtsHandler class.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsHandler.#ctor(Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonConfiguration,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration
member.summary: DtsPinConfiguration Class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration.HighLimit
member.summary: Gets the high limit.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration.LowLimit
member.summary: Gets the low limit.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration.SensorsIndexesToLog
member.summary: Gets the sensor indexes.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration.CtvBitIndexes
member.summary: Gets the ctv bit indexes.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration.ChunkLength
member.summary: Gets the lenght of the Chunck.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration.NumberOfSensors
member.summary: Gets the number of sensors.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration.DatalogSettings
member.summary: Gets the configuration settings.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration.SensorRegisterSize
member.summary: Gets the sensor register size.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration.PinName
member.summary: Gets the sensor register size.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration.Slope
member.summary: Gets the slope for temperature calculation.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration.Offset
member.summary: Gets the offset for temperature calculation.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration.ShouldPrintOnlyMaxSensor
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether to print only the maximun value of the sensor.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration.GetSensorsList
member.summary: Gets a the list of sensors.

member.name: T:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinHandler
member.summary: Gets the active bom group.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinHandler.#ctor(Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinConfiguration,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsPinHandler.Name
member.summary: Gets the pin Name.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsProcessingService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.DtsProcessingService.IDtsProcessingService
member.summary: Provide the capability of decoding DTS temperature from CTV data.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.IDtsProcessingService.CreateDtsHandler(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates an object to process CTV into DTS based on the specified configuration.
member.param: Name of the configuration to be processed.
The session context of this operation.
member.exception: Thrown when specified configurationName is not found in the Shared Storage.
member.example:
This is a code example:
var dtsHandler = Base.ServiceStore<IDtsProcessingService>.Service.CreateDtsHandler(this.DtsConfigurationName, this.SessionContext);

member.name: T:Prime.DtsProcessingService.IDtsHandler
member.summary: Object to manage DTS processing.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.IDtsHandler.ProcessDtsMeasurementsFromCtvData(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Process a CTV binary string into DTS temperatures.
member.param: List of tuples containing the pin name and CTV Data input as a binary string.
member.exception: Thrown when pins are found in dtsPinToCtvBinaryPinData not matching those in the DTSPinHandlers list.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.IDtsHandler.GetPinNames
member.summary: Returns the list of pin names from which the CTVs are going to be captured.
member.returns: A list containing the pin names.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.IDtsHandler.GetDtsPinHandle(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the list of pin names from which the CTVs are going to be captured.
member.exception: Thrown when the pinHandle for the pinName provided is not found in the DTSPinHandlers list.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.IDtsHandler.Reset
member.summary: Clear the structures from previous DTS Processed values. Expected to be called at the end of the test instance.

member.name: T:Prime.DtsProcessingService.IDtsPinHandler
member.summary: Object to manage DTS processing.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.IDtsPinHandler.ProcessDtsMeasurementsFromCtvData(System.String)
member.summary: Process a CTV binary string into DTS temperatures.
member.param: CTV Data input as a binary string.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.IDtsPinHandler.GetProcessedTemperaturesPerSensor
member.summary: Gets the temperature values calculated after processing the CTV.
member.returns: A dictionary with sensor ID as a key and a list of temperatures.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.IDtsPinHandler.GetProcessedTemperaturesPerChunk
member.summary: Gets the temperature values of all sensors calculated per chunk after processing the CTV.
member.returns: dictionary with chunk ID as a key and a list of temperatures.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.IDtsPinHandler.Reset
member.summary: Clear the structures from previous DTS Processed values. Expected to be called at the end of the test instance.

member.name: T:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonConfiguration
member.summary: Passes information from PacketConfiguration Files objects to Shared Storage structures.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonConfiguration.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration name.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonConfiguration.Pins
member.summary: Gets or sets list of pin configurations.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonConfiguration.ExportToSharedStorage
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to save to data to shared storage or not.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonConfiguration.DatalogValues
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or Sets logging mode.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonConfiguration.CompressedDatalog
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or Sets logging mode.

member.name: T:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonFile
member.summary: Passes information from PacketConfiguration Files objects to Shared Storage structures.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonFile.Schema
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration name.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonFile.Configurations
member.summary: Gets or sets list of pin configurations.

member.name: T:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonPinConfiguration
member.summary: Passes information from PacketConfiguration Files objects to Shared Storage structures.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonPinConfiguration.PinName
member.summary: Gets or Sets the name of the Pin from the CTV is going to be collected.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonPinConfiguration.PrintMaxSensor
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to print the maximum value among all sensors.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonPinConfiguration.SensorsList
member.summary: Gets or sets list ALL DTS sensors.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonPinConfiguration.NumberOfSensors
member.summary: Gets or Sets the size of each register.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonPinConfiguration.SensorRegisterSize
member.summary: Gets or Sets the size of each register.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonPinConfiguration.Slope
member.summary: Gets or Sets the slope for temperature calculation.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonPinConfiguration.Offset
member.summary: Gets or Sets the offset for temperature calculation.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonPinConfiguration.SensorIndexesToLog
member.summary: Gets or Sets the sensor to take into account when logging.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonPinConfiguration.CtvCaptureFromBits
member.summary: Gets or Sets the bits to take into account from the CTV input string.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonPinConfiguration.SetPoint
member.summary: Gets or Sets a value or usevar containing the value to set allowed temperature limits.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonPinConfiguration.UpperTolerance
member.summary: Gets or Sets a value or usevar containing the value to set allowed temperature limits.

member.name: P:Prime.DtsProcessingService.DtsJsonPinConfiguration.LowerTolerance
member.summary: Gets or Sets a value or usevar containing the value to set allowed temperature limits.

member.name: T:Prime.DtsProcessingService.ServiceParameterParser
member.summary: Provides helper functions to parse some parameters of the configuration.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.ServiceParameterParser.ToInteger(System.String)
member.summary: takes an configurationParameter string, if it is the name of a uservar it will return its values if not it returns the strong converted to a integer.
member.param: represents one of the configuration parameters defined by the user.
member.returns: integer representation of the configuration parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.DtsProcessingService.ServiceParameterParser.GetIndexesFromDelimitedString(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the indexes encoded in a delimited string.
member.param: represents a set of indexes in a user defined format.
